allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/@supabase/ssr/package.json'\); console.log\(p.version, p.exports ? Object.keys\(p.exports\) : 'no exports field'\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/@supabase/ssr/package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({version: p.version, main: p.main, module: p.module, exports: p.exports, sideEffects: p.sideEffects}, null, 2\)\)")
